title: Add DI Startup Failure Logging and Health Check Endpoints
description:
Research Report R2-006 (Confidence 87%, High). If planner DI registration fails, the hosted service may not start and the failure can be silently swallowed. Risks undetected agent downtime.

Fix:
1. Add explicit try/catch around service resolution in Program.cs with fatal-level logging
2. Add a /health endpoint that reports DI registration status
3. Add structured logging for all service lifecycle events (startup, shutdown, failure)

Source: research-MemorySmith.Agent Codebase Audit Sprint-35, Council Addendum 2026-06-26
